content.question: What is the causal magnitude of the 6- and 8-year Extended track specifically on socioeconomic segregation, controlling for church-school exemptions, geographic sorting, and standard (4-year) gimnazium selection?
content.reduction_path: Conduct matched-cohort analysis comparing students in extended-track-eligible versus ineligible localities, matched on demographics, settlement type, and prior achievement, measuring segregation outcomes and long-run earnings/attainment
